zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
以太坊当前价格1563附近运行，整体仍处于弱势震荡格局，价格持续位于20日均线1621下方，表明中期趋势偏空，反弹动能有限，市场缺乏明确方向。

MACD指标为负值且动能柱走弱，说明空头动能仍占主导，短期反弹多为修正性质。虽然RSI缺失，但结合价格结构判断，整体动能偏弱。

下方支撑关注1545至1540区间，该区域为近期低点密集带，上方阻力位于1585及1620附近，若无法突破1620则反弹空间受限，维持区间运行。

交易策略建议反弹高空为主，接近1580上方可分批布局空单，止损放在1625上方；若跌破1540支撑，则可能打开进一步下行空间，谨慎追空操作。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum vs USD remains in a short-term corrective structure, with price currently trading below the 20-day simple moving average at 1621.33. This positioning confirms that recent momentum has shifted to the downside despite intermittent intraday stabilization. The market continues to form lower highs, indicating that buyers have not yet regained control. Until ETH can reclaim the mid-1600s zone, the broader bias remains cautiously bearish with consolidation leaning toward distribution rather than accumulation.

Momentum indicators reinforce this view. The MACD reading at -15.237 reflects sustained bearish momentum, suggesting sellers are still dominant in the current cycle. With RSI unavailable, price action relative to the moving average becomes more important, and ETH trading below SMA(20) signals weakness in trend strength. The lack of bullish divergence or clear reversal signals implies that any upward moves may currently be corrective rather than trend-changing.

From a structural perspective, immediate support is located near the recent low of 1544.91, followed by secondary support around 1520 and the psychological 1500 level. On the upside, initial resistance appears at 1580, with stronger confluence resistance at the SMA(20) near 1621. A break and sustained close above this level would be required to shift short-term sentiment back toward neutral or bullish territory.

Trading conditions favor patience and selective positioning. Counter-trend shorts may be considered on failed rallies into the 1580–1620 resistance zone with tight risk control above 1630. Alternatively, bullish positioning is more appropriate only after a confirmed reclaim of the 1620 area with sustained volume. Until then, range-bound trading with a downside bias remains the more technically consistent approach.
